series_metadata.series_description: Required documents,in which the school districts must submit their emergency management plans to the Ohio Department of Education, to maintain their compliance in safety regulations. Every 3 years the plans expire and must be re-evaluated, reviewed and the final plan is approved and stored in the ''SAFE'' accounts database.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 6 years after the initial compliance of the emergency management plan, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain 6 years after the initial compliance of the emergency management plan, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
